name: ropensci-skills
description: Agent Skills that help R developers follow rOpenSci's guides and books — package standards, peer review, release, maintenance, and blogging.

plugins.name: ropensci-skills
plugins.description: Twelve composing skills for rOpenSci-compliant R package development: the context skills package-standards, peer-review-author, package-review, stats-standards, package-release, package-maintenance, and blog-post, plus the action skills run-package-review, run-test-audit, run-complexity, run-dependency-review, and run-performance-review that carry out review passes and emit transparent reports.
